content:
Hey everyone! 👋

I'm Fahad Oni from Bangladesh, and today I'm starting my journey of learning web development in public.

I'm currently learning HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, with the goal of becoming a skilled developer by consistently building projects and improving every day.

I know the road ahead won't always be easy, but I'm excited to embrace the challenges, learn from my mistakes, and document my progress along the way.

Through these posts, I'll be sharing:

💻 What I'm learning

🚀 Projects I'm building

🐛 Challenges and lessons learned

📈 My growth as a developer

Day 1 starts today. Here's to showing up, learning, and getting 1% better every day.
